verification.note: The Form 145/146 workflow and the Rs 5 lakh Part C/Form 146 threshold were checked against the Income Tax Department's Form 145 FAQ. The USD 1 million/year NRO repatriation cap traces to RBI's Master Direction on Remittance of Assets (FED Master Direction No. 13/2015-16) and the Master Direction on Other Remittance Facilities under FEMA - added 2026-07-06 CA review alongside the pre-existing secondary tax-reference summary, since a fintech blog alone is a thin citation for a regulatory cap; re-check the current RBI master direction (RBI updates these periodically) before treating the exact FEMA limit as final.
